description_long: This object is a small bird with a compact body, displaying a mix of olive-green and dark brown to black plumage. The wings and back are marked with intricate patterns of yellow-green and dark streaks, while the underparts appear more muted. The head is rounded and dark, with a short, conical beak that is well-suited for seed eating. The legs are slender and pale, tucked closely to the body. The tail is relatively short and appears slightly rounded at the tip, blending with the overall streamlined shape.
description: A small, olive-green and dark brown bird with a short, conical beak and intricate streaked plumage.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's compact body, streaked wings, and short, conical beak.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the bird's back pattern and the rounded shape of the tail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bird's muted underparts and wing markings.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the rounded head, dark crown, and beak shape.
attribute_plumage_pattern: mottled with streaks and patches of olive-green and dark brown, with yellow highlights on wings
